raw_consumer_statement:
Contacted Citibank to dispute ( documented letters and recorded calls ) an automatic charge of a membership fee on my Citibank XXXX XXXX and that I wanted the card canceled ( card was called in lost and was cut up ) for where Im now located there is no XXXX stores within a 400 mile radius. I have recorded conversations with both entities supervisors in getting the situation resolved. In my conversation with XXXX I was left with the impression that the charge was to be waived and that they would followup. That never happened. This was as of a year and half ago. Now appears they have started an all new membership fee with compounding interest charges. I have other cards with Citibank which are paid in full each month with XXXX balances. My credit rating is at XXXX. 
Can provide recordings and documentation if requested.
